Pros: Cheap. Good performance. The drive itself feels like it's good quality.
Cons: Feels can be deceiving, as the internals of this drive are horrible quality. It died with no warning less than a year into it's usage in a very light workload. Decided not to RMA due to TeamGroup requiring I ship it to Taiwan at my own cost, which would be more than the cost of the drive brand new. This was a relatively inexpensive lesson to learn, but it's still extremely disappointing none-the-less. I will be avoiding Team Group products and advising friends, family, and anyone that values their data to do the same.
